title: Chief Science & Research Officer
summary: The Chief Science & Research Officer keeps Neuroartan’s research clear, responsible, and grounded as ICOS develops.
biography: This executive seat is open. Neuroartan has defined the role before appointing a public holder so the standard is clear from the beginning.
The role protects research quality, evidence standards, and the way scientific ideas are translated into product language and product decisions.
This profile remains role-first until a human executive is hired, verified, and approved for publication.
mandate: Keep Neuroartan’s research and cognitive claims clear, reviewable, and responsible — so ICOS can grow with scientific discipline and public trust.
